differential_diagnoses: Enteropathy-associated T-cell lymphoma (EATL) or other T-cell lymphoproliferative disorder
NK-cell enteropathy or extranodal NK/T-cell lymphoma
Crohn's disease with secondary intestinal failure and fistula
next_steps: Surgical consultation for diagnostic and therapeutic resection of the symptomatic, aneurysmal, and ischemic jejunal segments
Surgical pathology evaluation with specialized immunohistochemical staining (e.g., T-cell markers, EBV, and NK-cell markers) on the resected specimen
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate to investigate the clonal NK-cell population and systemic lymphoproliferative risk
Evaluation of vaccine responses (e.g., pneumococcal polysaccharide titers) to formalize the CVID diagnosis
PET/CT scan to assess for systemic nodal involvement or localized hypermetabolic malignancy
Interdisciplinary review including hematology-oncology, colorectal surgery, and immunology
